data.title: CSU Global ranked among top 2026 online programs by U.S. News & World Report. No. 1 in Colorado for online bachelor's and master's programs.
data.description: Colorado State University Global (CSU Global) in Denver has been ranked as the top institution in Colorado for various online programs. These include being named No. 1 for Best Online Bachelor's Programs, Best Online Bachelor's Programs for Veterans, and Best Online Master's in Education Programs. This recognition comes as of January 27, 2026, further solidifying CSU Global's position as a leader in online education.

data.title: LexisNexis Risk Solutions attains "In Process" FedRAMP status, reinforcing commitment to federal security standards. Jan. 27, 2026 - WASHINGTON.
data.description: LexisNexis® Risk Solutions has achieved a significant milestone by meeting rigorous federal security standards, as confirmed by FedRAMP on January 27, 2026. The company is a top provider of data, analytics, and essential government technology solutions. This accomplishment highlights their long-standing trust, leadership, and commitment to maintaining high security standards for federal agencies. This news showcases the dedication of LexisNexis® Risk Solutions in ensuring the safety and protection of sensitive government information.

data.title: DataGuard appoints Arie Teter as CPTO to advance as top AI security & compliance platform; based in London.
data.description: A top SaaS security and compliance software provider, DataGuard, disclosed the hiring of Arie Teter as Chief Product & Technology Officer (CPTO) today. Stationed in London, UK, Teter will be in charge of managing DataGuard's Product and Engineering divisions, guiding the strategic growth and expandability of its comprehensive platform. His primary responsibility will involve driving DataGuard towards its goal of being recognized as the primary AI-driven security and compliance platform.

data.title: American Airlines faces $200 million loss after cancelling 9,000 flights. Q4 revenue: $14.0 billion, 4% growth from $13.7 billion in 2024.
data.description: American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ: AAL) saw its stock decline on Tuesday following the release of its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The airline reported record fourth-quarter revenue of $14.0 billion, up from $13.7 billion in the previous year, and full-year revenue of $54.6 billion, compared to $54.2 billion in 2024. Despite revenue growth, the company fell short of analyst expectations with adjusted earnings of 16 cents per diluted share for the quarter, missing the 34-cent estimate. The government shutdown in late 2025 reduced fourth-quarter revenue by approximately $325 million. Fourth-quarter operating margin decreased to 3.2% from 8.3% a year earlier due to higher costs and operational disruptions. Revenue passenger miles increased by 1.5% year over year to 61.596 billion, while available seat miles rose by 4.2% to 74.472 billion. The passenger load factor declined to 82.7% from 84.9%, and the passenger revenue per available seat mile fell by 2.0% in the quarter. Total revenue per available seat mile declined by 1.6%. These operational and financial results impacted the stock performance negatively.

data.title: FASTSIGNS® remains No. 1 in categorical rank on Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® list for a 10th consecutive year.
data.description: Based in Carrollton, Texas, FASTSIGNS®, a prominent franchise specializing in signs, graphics, and visual communications, has secured its place on a renowned industry list for the 14th consecutive year. This achievement comes amidst a significant milestone, with FASTSIGNS® celebrating a decade of being a dominant force in the sector. This recognition highlights the franchise's enduring success and commitment to excellence in the field of sign and visual communication services.

data.title: Onyx Coffee Lab named semifinalist for 2026 James Beard Award®, a breakthrough for specialty coffee.
data.description: In a significant development for the specialty coffee industry, Onyx Coffee Lab, based in Rogers, Arkansas, has recently been announced as one of the semifinalists for the prestigious 2026 James Beard Award® for Outstanding Bar. This recognition not only highlights the brand's success but also reflects the increasing prominence of specialty coffee on a national level. The achievement indicates a pivotal moment for Onyx Coffee Lab, showcasing its commitment to excellence and innovation in the sector. The announcement, made on January 27, 2026, underscores the growing importance of coffee culture and the dedication of establishments like Onyx Coffee Lab to elevate the standards within the industry. This nomination underscores the impressive strides made by Onyx Coffee Lab and underscores the positive trajectory of specialty coffee, solidifying its position on a broader stage.

data.title: Lifespark unveils COMPLETE Senior Living model managing 50+ communities in MN and WI, plans for growth in 2026.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Lifespark, a senior health company, announced its new COMPLETE Senior Living (CSL) model, with plans for expansion in 2026. Managing over 50 senior living communities in Minnesota and Wisconsin, CSL integrates Lifespark Senior Living Management, SPARK Growth and Wellness by Dr. Bill Thomas, Lifespark Medical Group, and Lifespark Hospice. The aging population’s growth has led to significant market opportunities for Lifespark.

data.title: US Navy chooses Gentex PURSUIT™ Helmet System for next-gen fixed wing aircraft; supports advancements in helmet-mounted display systems.
data.description: In Carbondale, Pennsylvania, a new helmet called PURSUIT has been introduced, specifically designed to cater to the needs of modern fighter pilots. This innovative helmet is equipped to facilitate advancements in aircraft helmet-mounted display systems.

data.title: Xsolla partners with JKOPay in Taiwan, expanding payment coverage to 6.5M users, enhancing checkout options for gamers.
data.description: Xsolla, a prominent video game commerce company, has revealed the expansion of its payment services in Taiwan by introducing JKOPay, the leading mobile payment brand in the country. Through integration with Xsolla Pay Station, developers and publishers now have the ability to provide secure and convenient mobile payment options to gamers in Taiwan. This expansion aims at catering to one of Asia's highly interactive gaming communities. The development is supported by An and offers numerous benefits to game developers and publishers.

data.title: Auto experts in San Antonio provide guidance on selecting PPF installers. Tips include what to look for when choosing an installer.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 27, 2026, an article by HelloNation spotlighted Marco Escamilla and Hilary Escamilla from Platinum Auto Films, discussing key considerations for selecting a paint protection film installer. The piece emphasizes the importance of conducting thorough research on the expertise and reputation of the installer. Vehicle owners are advised to inquire about the installer's experience, certifications, and reviews from previous clients. It is recommended to ensure the installer uses high-quality film products and provides a warranty for their services. Overall, the article serves as a valuable guide for individuals seeking a reliable paint protection film expert.

data.title: 1Money partners with M0 to launch custom stablecoin issuance offering, issuing digital dollars for fintech builders. Regulatory compliant.
data.description: A new announcement from 1Money, a stablecoin infrastructure company based in New York, reveals the launch of a custom stablecoin issuance offering through M0, a universal stablecoin platform. This initiative involves the issuance of fully reserved digital dollars, enabling fintech developers to deploy and incorporate personalized, interoperable stablecoins on a large scale. With expertise in digital asset regulations, 1Money offers a comprehensive solution for creating stablecoins and possesses a significant presence in the U.S. money-transmit sector.

data.title: UK Construction Industry to see 3.2% AAGR between 2026-2029 with growth in infrastructure, data centers, housing & renewable energy projects.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "The UK Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The UK construction industry is projected to have grown by 1.6% in real terms in 2025. This growth is attributed to investments in sectors such as commercial and energy, as well as an increase in consumer confidence. The report provides an analysis of various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, looking ahead to 2029 (Q4 2025).

data.title: Qatar construction market to expand by 5% in 2025 and 4.3% in 2026 with focus on energy and infrastructure sectors.
data.description: The "Qatar Construction Market" report provides insights into the country's construction industry, forecasting a 5% real-term expansion in 2025 and 4.3% in 2026. The market analysis covers sectors such as Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential. Key areas of growth include investments in renewable energy and transportation infrastructure. The report is available for analysis up to 2029, offering comprehensive trends and forecasts for the construction market in Qatar.

data.title: LevelBlue partners with Fortra to offer advanced cybersecurity solutions, aiming to combat evolving threats.
data.description: In Dallas, LevelBlue, the leading provider of managed security services worldwide, has revealed a key partnership with Fortra, a prominent cybersecurity solutions company. This alliance merges Fortra’s top-tier products with LevelBlue’s exceptional managed services to create a holistic security solution aimed at addressing the changing threat environment. The collaboration signifies a significant achievement for LevelBlue in their commitment to offering proactive security measures.

data.title: Infinitum to unveil new EC Fan Systems & motor tech at AHR 2026 in Austin, Texas. Expanding product line at expo.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Infinitum is set to present their expansive product range at the AHR Expo. This will include the introduction of the Infinitum EC Fan Systems.

data.title: HDI unveils conference program for HDI Service & Support World, an event blending IT service management, customer support, and technical support.
data.description: In San Francisco, HDI, a leading organization in service and support excellence, has announced the conference program for HDI Service & Support World. This event is community-driven and aims to enhance the service and support industry. It combines IT service management, customer support, and technical support to unite the complete IT service and support network. HDI Service & Support World is a pivotal event for professionals in this field and will take place in a location where the entire ecosystem can converge.

data.title: Fayetteville–Springdale–Rogers, AR is best large metro & St. George, UT top small per Milken Institute's 2026 rankings.
data.description: In the latest 2026 Milken Institute Best-Performing Cities (BPC) report, Fayetteville–Springdale–Rogers, AR has been recognized as the top-performing large metropolitan area, holding this prestigious title after consistently being ranked in the top 15 since 2021. Additionally, for small cities, St. George, UT claimed the leading position in the index after being the runner-up in the previous year’s rankings. Both metro areas stood out due to their robust labor markets showcasing consistent growth, alongside their expanding high-tech sectors driving their success.
